name: Jimmy's Jewelry And Pawn Shop
description_short: Jimmy's Jewelry And Pawn Shop in Atlantic Beach, FL buys, sells, and loans against jewelry, gold, and collateral. Operating since 1980 with wheelchair accessibility and extended weekday hours.
description_long:
Jimmy's Jewelry And Pawn Shop has been operating in Atlantic Beach, Florida since 1980, establishing itself as a long-standing fixture in the local community. Located at 55 Sailfish Drive East, the shop operates as a traditional pawn broker offering collateral-based lending and merchandise sales typical of established pawn operations.

The shop accepts multiple forms of payment including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover, and Debit Cards, making transactions convenient for customers. They maintain consistent business hours Monday through Friday from 10:00 AM to 5:30 PM, with Saturday hours from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM. The facility is wheelchair accessible, providing accommodation for customers with mobility needs. Their primary service appears to focus on jewelry and pawn transactions, with delivery options available to customers.

The shop's primary distinction is its 40+ year operational history in the Atlantic Beach area, suggesting established community relationships and continuity in business operations. Their extended weekday hours until 5:30 PM accommodate working professionals, and Saturday availability provides weekend access. The facility's wheelchair accessibility indicates attention to inclusive customer service.

Limitations of this business include sparse online presence—no website or email contact information is listed on their profile. The business listing contains minimal detail about specific services, loan terms, interest rates, or jewelry buyback procedures. Potential customers cannot verify current inventory, compare rates online, or initiate contact digitally. The CMac.ws directory listing shows only 146 visits, indicating limited online visibility compared to competitors like Prestige Jewelry & Pawn located 2 miles away.
address: 55 Sailfish Dr E, Atlantic Beach, FL 32233

pros: Established 1980—over 40 years of operational history in Atlantic Beach
Extended weekday hours (10 AM–5:30 PM Mon-Fri) accommodate working professionals
Multiple payment methods accepted including all major credit cards and debit
Wheelchair accessible facility meets ADA accommodation standards
Delivery service available for customer convenience
Saturday hours (10 AM–4 PM) provide weekend access
Local business directory presence with phone contact available
cons: No website or email listed—limited digital presence and online engagement capability
Minimal service details published—loan terms, interest rates, and buyback procedures not disclosed
No customer reviews or ratings available to evaluate service quality
Low online visibility (146 directory visits) compared to nearby competitors
No information about jewelry valuation methods, loan-to-value ratios, or redemption policies
best_for: Local Atlantic Beach residents needing quick collateral-based loans against jewelry or valuables
Individuals seeking to sell or pawn jewelry without extensive online research or digital interaction
Customers who prefer in-person transactions and face-to-face negotiation
diagnosis: Jimmy's Jewelry And Pawn Shop is best suited for Atlantic Beach-area residents needing fast collateral-based cash loans or seeking to sell jewelry locally. The primary caveat is the complete absence of online presence, pricing transparency, and customer reviews, making it difficult to evaluate loan terms or service quality before visiting in person.
